data.title: Palantir and NVIDIA Team to Deliver Sovereign AI Operating System Reference Architecture
data.description: Palantir Technologies, a leading tech company listed on NASDAQ as PLTR, unveiled a new sovereign AI Operating System (AI OS) reference architecture in collaboration with NVIDIA. This partnership aims to provide customers with a comprehensive AI datacenter solution, covering all aspects from hardware acquisition to deploying applications. The Palantir AI OS Reference Architecture (AIOS-RA) offers a fully operational AI infrastructure and is built upon NVIDIA Enterprise Reference Architectures. It is thoroughly tested and certified to support Palantir's entire software suite, including AIP and Foundation. This joint venture is set to streamline AI implementation processes for clients.

data.title: Sleep Number Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Minneapolis, Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and the fiscal year ending on January 3, 2026. President and CEO Linda Findley stated that the company surpassed its 2025 guidance shared during the previous earnings call. Despite ongoing efforts in a turnaround strategy, Sleep Number demonstrated notable advancements in new product launches, marketing initiatives, and cost reductions. During 2025, the pro-forma adjusted EBITDA margin reached around 9%.

data.title: Sunbelt Rentals Announces Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Sunbelt Rentals Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SUNB) revealed its fiscal third-quarter results for 2026, which concluded on January 31, 2026. The company, renowned in the equipment rental sector, shifted its main listing to the New York Stock Exchange on March 2, 2026, and adopted U.S. Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (“GAAP”) reporting. Key highlights from the third quarter of fiscal 2026 included the total revenue.

data.title: Newport LLC Welcomes AI and Cybersecurity Strategist George Tsantes as Partner to Help Mid-Market and Enterprise Leaders Navigate the Intelligent Era
data.description: Veteran professional Tsantes has amassed 35 years of experience in financial services, AI, and cybersecurity, as well as boardroom advisory roles with global companies. He now joins Newport's expanding mid-Atlantic advisory team, enriching it with his valuable expertise. This development was announced on March 12, 2026 in Washington.

data.title: Burning Rock releases Q4 and FY 2025 financial results, record revenues of $XX million reported.
data.description: An announcement was made today regarding a significant increase in global temperatures over the past decade. Data shows that the average temperature has risen by 1.2 degrees Celsius since the pre-industrial era. This rise is alarming as it indicates a faster rate of warming than previously predicted. The year 2020 was one of the warmest years on record, with temperatures 1.5 degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels. The findings highlight the urgent need for immediate action to combat climate change and its catastrophic impacts.

data.title: Newsweek ranks GDT among America's greatest midsize workplaces for women 2026
data.description: In Dallas on March 12, 2026, GDT, a prominent provider of enterprise IT solutions and services, has been honored by Newsweek by being included in the list of America's Greatest Midsize Workplaces for Women 2026. This acknowledgment highlights GDT as one of the exceptional organizations that prioritize gender equality and women's empowerment in the workplace.

data.title: INJ price forecast: aims for $3.22-$3.60 by April 2026. Neutral RSI at 45, consolidating above key support.
data.description: Injective (INJ) has experienced a breakout, reaching $3.22, and there is potential for a rally up to the $3.60 range. Technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 45, with INJ consolidating above crucial support levels.

data.title: SOC Prime Launches DetectFlow Enterprise To Enhance Security Data Pipelines with Agentic AI
data.description: SOC Prime has unveiled DetectFlow Enterprise in Boston, a new solution that pioneers real-time threat detection at the ingestion layer. This transforms data pipelines into detection pipelines, facilitating the running of tens of thousands of Sigma detections on live Kafka streams with millisecond Mean-Time-to-Detect (MTTD) utilizing Apache Flink. With DetectFlow Enterprise, security teams can identify, label, enhance, and associate threat data in transit, enhancing security before data accesses downstream systems like SIEM, EDR, and Data Lakes.

data.title: OX Security Introduces the First Agentic Pentester to Link Exploits Directly to Code
data.description: In New York on March 12, 2026, OX Security unveiled OX Agentic Pentester, a tool utilizing AI for attack simulation to highlight vulnerabilities and offer precise solutions within code. This new capability offers continuous penetration testing, driven by agentic AI, ensuring a proactive approach to identifying and addressing potential exploits.

data.title: Hamilton Zanze Announces Sale of Tresa at Arrowhead
data.description: A popular San Francisco-based multifamily real estate investment firm, Hamilton Zanze, revealed the sale of Tresa at Arrowhead, a 360-unit garden-style community in Glendale, Arizona. The firm had owned this community for more than nine years before the transaction. The sale was announced on March 12, 2026, with Hamilton Zanze making significant gains through this deal.
